data.description: An Easter truce is declared from 16:00 on April 11 to the end of the day on April 12, 2026, the Kremlin reports.

data.title: Subsea7 awarded offshore contract for Sépia 2 in Brazil
data.description: Luxembourg - Today, Subsea 7 S.A. revealed receiving a significant contract from Petrobras after a competitive tender process. The contract is for the development of the Sépia 2 field, situated around 280 kilometers southeast of Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. The field is located at a substantial water depth of 2,170 meters in the pre-salt Santos Basin. This contract is pivotal considering Sépia 2 is among Brazil's major pre-salt expansion phases, crucial for the country's energy development. Subsea 7 S.A. is listed as SUBC on the Oslo Børs and as SUBCY in ADR.

data.title: Transitioning to Passive Real Estate: A Guide for Seniors
data.description: A lifestyle-oriented approach aimed at decreasing stress, protecting income, and streamlining financial matters has gained momentum among seniors. In San Francisco on April 9, 2026, reports highlighted the increasing number of seniors opting out of direct property management responsibilities. This shift is notable as many elderly property owners have amassed wealth over years of hands-on involvement in real estate ventures.

data.title: Nômade Tulum, Nômade Holbox, and Be Tulum Launch 20% Summer Offer, Redefining Luxury Travel Through Signature Journey Designers
data.description: In an exclusive offer for the summer season, travelers are encouraged to explore personalized, transformative stays in Tulum and Holbox. Expert Journey Designers have curated these experiences for those looking for enriched getaways. The offer is available starting April 9, 2026, in Tulum, Mexico. This unique opportunity aims to provide travelers with tailored experiences that go beyond the ordinary, creating lasting memories.

data.title: HelloNation Article Featuring Veterinary Expert Dr. Ashley Wheatley Examines How to Find the Right Veterinarian for Your Pet in Evans, Georgia
data.description: In Evans, Georgia on April 9, 2026, a recent article emphasized the significance of communication, preventative care, and clinic services in aiding pet owners to select a reliable veterinary clinic. The article stresses the importance of specific factors that pet owners should consider when deciding on a veterinarian for their animal's sustainable health and well-being. HelloNation delves into enlightening pet owners about the aspects to prioritize, aiming to guide them in making informed decisions for the long-term care of their beloved pets.

data.title: YuJa Introduces Candidate AI Interview Module to Advance and Secure Online Interview Experiences
data.description: YuJa, a prominent provider in accessibility, video management, and test proctoring solutions for regulated industries, has enhanced its proctoring features for interview processes within the Verity Test Proctoring Platform by introducing the Candidate AI Interview Module. This advancement aims to assist organizations and agencies in making well-informed hiring decisions that foster progress and creativity. The innovation, known as the YuJa Candidate AI Interview Module, leverages YuJa Verity's Proctoring Engines to streamline and enhance the interview process for users.

data.title: Harrah’s Oklahoma Officially Opens in Chandler
data.description: In Chandler, Oklahoma, Harrah’s Oklahoma has opened its doors as the inaugural Caesars Entertainment-managed property in the state. This collaboration with the Iowa Tribe of Oklahoma has introduced a new hub for tourism and entertainment in the region. The grand opening event included a ribbon-cutting ceremony with tribal and Caesars executives, gaming premieres, appearances by local celebrities, live performances, and a spectacular fireworks display. This marks a significant milestone for Caesars Entertainment, the Iowa Tribe of Oklahoma, and the state's gaming industry.

data.title: Graybar Announces District Leadership Changes
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Graybar, a prominent distributor of electrical, industrial, automation, and connectivity products, revealed district leadership changes. Regis Ganley is one of the key figures impacted by this announcement. Graybar specializes in offering a wide range of products and supply chain management services to its customers.

data.title: Ondas Holdings Wins World Cup Security Role As Geopolitical Risks Mount
data.description: Ondas (NASDAQ: ONDS) has been chosen to implement counter-drone systems for the upcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup, securing contracts valued at several million dollars amidst the increasing demand for unobtrusive event security. Its branch, Sentrycs, will introduce Cyber-over-RF technology in numerous locations across North America to identify and neutralize unauthorized drones, showcasing Ondas' expanding involvement in airspace security. The company recently revealed a significant contract win for its subsidiary, 4M Defense, in a competitive bid for a large demining project as part of Israel's $1.7 billion Eastern Border Security Barrier initiative. This initiative is focused on enhancing security along about 500 kilometers of the nation's eastern border. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI now creates high-quality brand photos with the right prompts. Learn how to craft them for your business. (Read More)
data.description: Cutting-edge AI image tools are now capable of generating brand photography of editorial quality, provided they are given the right prompts. A detailed technical analysis outlines the process for creating prompts that are ready for production, highlighting the advanced capabilities of the AI technology. This development marks a significant advancement in the field, with the potential to revolutionize the way brand photography is created.

data.title: Why Bitcoin, Ethereum Institutional Interest Rebounded In March
data.description: Growing institutional interest in digital assets is evident amidst geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties, showcasing a shift towards crypto and tokenization. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has been a major attraction for institutional investors, with ETFs witnessing a significant $1.32 billion inflow in March, breaking a streak of outflows lasting four months. Notably, there was substantial buying activity in the $66,000–$68,000 range, indicating accumulation at key price levels. On the contrary, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) ETFs experienced outflows totaling $46 million, stretching a six-month period of continuous withdrawals. This divergence in ETF flows underscores... (Further details can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: $271M in BTC sold by old Bitcoin whales raises concerns about crypto rally sustainability, despite positive market momentum.
data.description: On Sunday, large Bitcoin investors known as whales offloaded $270 million worth of BTC. Despite this significant sell-off, traders have been steadily buying up supply, which should support the bullish momentum in the market.

data.title: Experian® Partners with Taylor Rooks to Empower Consumers During Financial Literacy Month
data.description: Experian, headquartered in Costa Mesa, California, has announced a collaboration with journalist and on-air personality, Taylor Rooks, for a campaign in honor of Financial Literacy Month. This partnership aims to raise awareness and promote financial education.
